transactions.desc: Baltimore optioned Sanders to Triple-A Norfolk on Sunday.
Baltimore selected Huff's contract from Triple-A Norfolk on Sunday.
The Padres optioned Brito to Triple-A El Paso on Sunday.
San Diego reinstated Peralta (personal) from the bereavement list Sunday.
San Diego reinstated Vasquez (ankle) from the 15-day IL on Sunday.
Houston designated Pearson for assignment on Sunday, Matt Kawahara of the Houston Chronicle reports.
The Astros recalled Delgado from Triple-A Sugar Land on Sunday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.

Manager Aaron Boone said Rodriguez, who was recalled from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre to serve as the 27th man for Sunday's doubleheader against the Dodgers, will "potentially" start Game 2 of the twin bill, Gary Phillips of the New York Daily News reports.
Miami optioned Hinds to Jacksonville on Sunday.
The Marlins recalled Pauley from Triple-A Jacksonville on Sunday.
The Pirates optioned Curtis to Triple-A Indianapolis on Sunday, Danny Demilio of PittsburghBaseballNow.com reports.
Atlanta selected Hernandez's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Sunday.
Atlanta optioned Murphy to Triple-A Gwinnett on Sunday.
The Pirates signed Fletcher to a minor-league contract Friday.
The Red Sox released Coulombe on Saturday.
The Tigers optioned Brieske to Triple-A Toledo on Saturday.
The Chicago Cubs traded RHP Aiden Moffett to the  Athletics.
The Tigers reinstated Valdez from the bereavement list Saturday.
The  Athletics traded RHP Aaron Civale to the Chicago Cubs.
The Guardians optioned Heuer to Triple-A Columbus on Saturday.
The Guardians recalled Dion from Triple-A Columbus on Saturday.
The Athletics designated Meneses for assignment Saturday.
The Athletics selected Hartlieb's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Saturday.
Bradish agreed to terms on a five-year, $90 million contract extension with the Orioles on Saturday.
The Mariners designated Mastrobuoni for assignment Saturday.
The Mariners reinstated Rodriguez from the 7-day injured list Saturday.
The Diamondbacks selected Carrillo to the 40-man roster Saturday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Del Castillo from Triple-A Reno on Saturday.
Texas optioned Teodo to Triple-A Round Rock on Saturday.
Texas optioned Collyer to Triple-A Round Rock on Saturday.
